name: Honey-Lavender Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the first four ingredients in a small bowl.
2. Whisk the sugar and eggs in a large bowl until lightly lemon-colored; stir in the next three ingredients. Sift the dry ingredients over the egg mixture, then fold in until the dough is just combined.
3. Follow steps 3 and 4 in the Lemon-Anise Biscotti recipe.
